title: gynotroches axillaris
intro: Gynotroches axillaris is a species of flowering plant in the family Guttiferae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, offering benefits such as improved wound healing, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, Gynotroches axillaris can be used as a tea, tincture, or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
